---
title: Request in-person card payment method
audience:
  - dev
related:
  - /payments/concepts/merchants
---

# Request in-person card payment method

Request the in-person card payment method so your merchants can accept card payments with their terminal app.

## Prerequisites {#prerequisites}

- A **merchant profile** with the status **Enabled**. If you don't have one yet, [request a merchant profile](../../profiles/request.mdx) first.
- A project access token or a user access token with **Can manage members** rights.

## Request the payment method {#request}

Call the `requestMerchantPaymentMethods` mutation.

<a href="https://explorer.swan.io?%3D&tab=api" className="explorer-badge">Open in API Explorer</a>

```graphql
mutation RequestInPersonCardMethod {
  requestMerchantPaymentMethods(
    input: {
      merchantProfileId: "$YOUR_MERCHANT_PROFILE_ID"
      inPersonCard: {
        activate: true
      }
    }
  ) {
    ... on RequestMerchantPaymentMethodsSuccessPayload {
      merchantProfile {
        merchantPaymentMethods {
          ... on InPersonCardMerchantPaymentMethod {
            id
            methodId
            mainLocationId
            statusInfo {
              status
            }
            updatedAt
            version
          }
        }
      }
    }
    ... on ForbiddenRejection {
      __typename
      message
    }
    ... on InvalidPaymentMethodRequestRejection {
      __typename
      message
    }
  }
}
```

## Payment method review {#review}

The payment method is created with the status `PendingReview` and version number `1`.

Swan reviews all new merchant payment methods.
We may contact you for more information before accepting or rejecting it.

After the review, the status updates to either `Enabled` or `Rejected`.

| Status | Explanation |
| --- | --- |
| `PendingReview` | Payment method submitted and waiting for Swan's review. |
| `WaitingForInformation` | Swan needs more information. Refer to [provide missing information](../../missing-information.mdx) to learn what to submit. |
| `Enabled` | Payment method approved. The merchant can accept in-person card payments. |
| `Suspended` | Swan suspended the payment method due to detected risk. |
| `Disabled` | Payment method deactivated. |
| `Rejected` | Payment method rejected. The decision is final. The merchant must submit a new request. |

:::tip
Subscribe to merchant webhooks to monitor changes in payment method status. Review the full list of [merchant webhooks](/payments/concepts/merchants) or subscribe to them from your **Dashboard** > **Developers** > **Webhooks**.
:::
